title: ficus iteoides
intro: Ficus iteoides, also known as the creeping fig or climbing fig, is a species of flowering plant in the family Moraceae. The leaves and roots of Ficus iteoides are used in traditional medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating wounds. Ficus iteoides can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular remedy in folk medicine, although its effectiveness and safety require further scientific study.
